title: Style Entry Schema
description: Schema for Axis 2 style entries. Style is the kind or mode of writing (rhetorical, narrative, or genre category).

frame.description: The rhetorical or narrative frame (e.g., argument, narrative, expository)

structural_conventions.description: The typical structure rules for this style

evidence_types.description: Types of evidence or support this style typically uses

reader_contract.description: What the reader can expect from a piece written in this style

classical_mode.description: Classical rhetorical mode if applicable (narration, description, exposition, argumentation)
